narratives.evidence_quote: रूस के राष्ट्रपति व्लादिमीर पुतिन ने स्पष्ट कहा है कि अगर नाटो ने सीधा हमला किया तो जंग रूस और नाटो की होगी.
narratives.reasoning: This quote forecasts a direct war between Russia and NATO in the event of a NATO attack on Russia, representing a predicted outcome of the conflict.

narratives.evidence_quote: परमाणु परीक्षण कर सकता है रूस
narratives.reasoning: The claim that Russia could conduct a nuclear test introduces a heightened threat scenario, aiming to instill fear about escalation.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Speculating war outcomes: Russian army is collapsing
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रक्षा एक्सपर्ट्स का मानना है कि अगर यूक्रेन यही इसी तरह से हमला करता रहा तो अगले साल मार्च-अप्रैल तक ये बेहद कमजोर हो जाएगा.
subnarratives.reasoning: The sentence forecasts that, due to ongoing Ukrainian attacks, Russia's forces will become very weak by next spring, implying a collapse/deterioration of the Russian army.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: अगर नाटो यूक्रेन के समर्थन में उसके शहरों पर हमला करता है तो परमाणु युद्ध टाला नहीं जा सकता.
subnarratives.reasoning: This line presents a scenario of nuclear escalation as a potential outcome of NATO involvement, which is a war-outcome speculation not captured by the other subnarratives.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: There is a real possibility that nuclear weapons will be employed
subnarratives.evidence_quote: अगर नाटो यूक्रेन के समर्थन में उसके शहरों पर हमला करता है तो परमाणु युद्ध टाला नहीं जा सकता.
subnarratives.reasoning: This sentence explicitly asserts that nuclear war could occur if NATO attacks, directly supporting fear-based claims about the potential use of nuclear weapons.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: Russia will also attack other countries
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इन लड़ाकों के जरिए रूस यूक्रेन और नाटो की सेना पर हमला करे.
subnarratives.reasoning: This line describes Russia employing allied fighters to attack Ukraine and NATO forces, illustrating the narrative that Russia could expand conflict to other countries.
